recto.ordreRequisDesc: Check rank {{rang}} of this ability first.
recto.pointsInsuffisantsDesc_one: Missing {{count}} ability point for this rank.
recto.pointsInsuffisantsDesc_other: Missing {{count}} ability points for this rank.
recto.bonusDefDisp: Various defense bonuses (magic armor, spells, etc.)

portrait.figeLegend: Portrait locked · Click "Locked" to adjust framing
portrait.glisserLegend: Drag to frame · Scroll to zoom
portrait.moletteLegend: Scroll to zoom · Full image visible

modalDeverrouiller.description: In free mode, <highlight>all fields become editable</highlight>, including automatically calculated ones (attack, DEF, HP…).
modalDeverrouiller.avertissement: ⚠ The values you enter replace automatic calculations. To restore calculations, lock the sheet from the Settings menu.

calibrage.glisser: Drag a golden tag to move the field

nav.terminerTitle: Complete the required elements before finishing

step0.intro: Let's start with basic information about your character.

step1.intro: Your people determines your ability modifiers, your people path, and your cultural path.
step1.voiesInfo: Your people and cultural paths will be available in the Profile & Paths step.

FOR.label: Strength
FOR.desc: Physical power. Melee attacks and damage.

DEX.label: Dexterity
DEX.desc: Agility and reflexes. Initiative, ranged attacks, DEF.

SAG.label: Wisdom
SAG.desc: Willpower and perception. Magic points and spell duration.

step3.introLibre: Choose 3 profile paths — your family is determined by your selection.
step3.introProfil: Choose a profile — its paths and martial training are set automatically.
step3.sangMeleInfo: As a Half-blood, choose 2 people paths from the available peoples (limited to the first 3 ranks), then a cultural path from one of those two peoples.
step3.choisir2Voies: Choose at least 2 paths from the same family to determine your family.
step3.compagnonsEtape: by your paths — equip them in the Specialization & Equipment step.

aventuriers.label: Adventurers
aventuriers.bonus: d8 HP · 2 training · Melee+1 · Ranged+1 · LP+2

mystiques.label: Mystics
mystiques.bonus: d6 HP · 1 training · Magic+2 · MP×2 · Magical talent

step4.intro: Scores automatically calculated from your choices.

step5.introFormations_one: Number of training based on family: {{count}} (+ peasant weapons free)
step5.introFormations_other: Number of training based on family: {{count}} (+ peasant weapons free)

step6.inventaireHint: Feel free to customize the inventory with personal items without market value, such as a letter, a seashell full of memories, the feather of the first raptor they hunted, etc.
step6.inventaireDefault: a blanket, a torch, a flint and steel, a waterskin, a mess kit

step7.personnagePret: All elements are filled in. Your character is ready to play.
step7.sauvegarderDesc: Save your character to the library to find it again in your next sessions.
step7.imprimerDesc: Print the front and back sheet to play with a physical sheet at hand.

equipement.aucuneEntree: No entries — enable edit mode to add some
equipement.ajouterDepuisCatalogue: Add weapons or armor from the Catalogue
equipement.infoEdition: Changes are in memory until exported. Replace src/data/{{section}}.json then run npm run build.
equipement.armesNotesDef:
¹ Two-handed weapon.
² Critical hit on 19 or 20.
³ Special rules, see below.
⁴ Minimum STR score required: 12 for the longbow, 14 for the composite bow.
⁵ Requires a limited action to add the Ability Mod. to damage.
⁶ Requires an attack action to reload.
⁷ Requires a limited action to reload.
* Requires a feat to be proficient.
equipement.armuresNotesDef:
¹ Cumbersome, these armors cancel the DEX bonus to DEF.
² Custom-made, requires the Heavy Armor feat (bastion path) to be worn.

saveLoad.aucunPersonnage: No characters — import a file or save the current character

levelUp.niveauMaxAtteint: Maximum level reached. You can reset the character to level 1 below.
levelUp.nouvelleVoieDesc: Upon reaching level 8, you can unlock a prestige path or a fourth path. This is optional — you can also choose nothing.
levelUp.voieApparaitra: The path will appear below to spend points on.
levelUp.depenseAvantLancer: Spend all your path points before rolling dice.
levelUp.resetDesc: All path ranks will be erased. Scores will be restored to:
levelUp.resetSnapshotManquant: Level 1 snapshot unavailable — HP, MP and attacks will be reset to 0.
levelUp.resetSnapshotAstuce: Tip: level up from level 1 to save the snapshot.
levelUp.golemRang2: The Golem tab is now accessible — choose your golem's role.
levelUp.golemRang3: Your golem gains a specialization based on its role.
levelUp.golemRang4: Your golem can receive its first improvement (Golem tab).
levelUp.golemNiveau9: Your golem can receive an additional improvement (2/4).
levelUp.golemNiveau13: Your golem can receive an additional improvement (3/4).
levelUp.golemNiveau17: Your golem can receive its final improvement (4/4).
levelUp.ethereeRang1: The Runes tab is now accessible — compose your first ethereal spells. You master an Apprentice Attribute glyph.
levelUp.ethereeRang2: Chaotic Draw unlocked — create a spell by randomly drawing your runes (no PM cost).
levelUp.ethereeRang3: You master an Initiate Attribute glyph — Initiate glyphs are now accessible in the Runes tab.
levelUp.ethereeRang4: Runic Chant — you can now create ethereal spells without free hands (max 2 attribute glyphs).
levelUp.ethereeRang5: You master an Adept Attribute glyph — Adept glyphs are now accessible in the Runes tab.
levelUp.divinesRang1: Divine glyphs unlocked — add an optional Divine Glyph to your spells for +1 to rank (Runes tab).
levelUp.divinesRang2: Superior elemental glyphs — you can increase elemental DM by one category (d4→d6→d8→d10).
levelUp.divinesRang3: Expert runist — rank 6 spells unlocked. You master an additional glyph.
levelUp.divinesRang4: Quick spells — your ethereal spells can now be created as an attack action.
levelUp.divinesRang5: Master runist — rank 7 spells unlocked. A 4th Attribute glyph slot is now available in the Runes tab.

descEditor.accesVoiesMasqueesDesc: These paths are hidden from all users. Enter the password to access them.
descEditor.importErrFormatGeneral: Unrecognized format. Use files exported from this editor.
descEditor.importErrFormatType: Unrecognized format. Use files exported from this editor (type: {{type}}).
descEditor.importErrContientMsg:
This file contains {{label}}.
Use the "Import a path / Import" button in the relevant section, not this button.
descEditor.importErrMauvaisType: This file is of type "{{got}}", expected "{{expected}}".
descEditor.confirmSupprimerPeuple: Delete people "{{nom}}" and all its cultures?
descEditor.confirmReinitialiserMsg: Reset all data to the game's default values?
descEditor.confirmDevSauvegarderMsg: This will write to src/data/ and reload the app. Continue?
descEditor.effetsAideStat: Stat modified on the sheet (PV, DEF, INIT, PR, PM, PC, ATT_CONTACT, ATT_DISTANCE, ATT_MAGIQUE, DM_ARME, DM_MAINS_NUES, FOR … CHA)
descEditor.effetsAideFormule: Replaces the fixed value with a characteristic modifier (MOD_FOR, MOD_DEX, MOD_CON, MOD_INT, MOD_SAG, MOD_CHA)
descEditor.effetsAideValeur: Fixed bonus or penalty added to the stat (can be negative)
descEditor.effetsAideDes: Dice notation for variable damage — e.g. 1d6, 2d4. Mainly used with DM_ARME / DM_MAINS_NUES
descEditor.effetsAideXRang: Multiplies the value or dice count by the current rank — e.g. rank 3 with «1d6» → 3d6
descEditor.effetsAideActifRang: The effect only counts if this minimum rank is reached (useful for a conditional bonus triggered later)
descEditor.effetsAideAvancee: The effect belongs to the advanced ability and is not calculated in normal totals
descEditor.effetsAideSi: Condition: shield equipped / wielding a specific weapon / unarmed in main hand
descEditor.effetsAideTokenRang: Current PC rank in this path
descEditor.compAideInitPvDef: Fixed number or formula. Click the [f] button to toggle formula mode
descEditor.compAideAttBonus: Fixed attack modifier (e.g. +5) or formula (e.g. [ATT contact])
descEditor.compAideCapacites: Free text describing the companion's special abilities
descEditor.compAideTokenRang: Ranks acquired in the path granting this companion

langNotice.corps: Game data (names, descriptions, paths, traits…) is stored in French, the original language of the game. Editing fields always display the French source text. Navigation lists and interface labels are translated. To manage translations, use the Translation Editor.

golem.activationDesc: This character doesn't have a Golem configuration yet. Enable it to choose a role and improvements once Golem Path rank 2 is reached.
golem.statsNote: HP and ATK are based on current level (lv. {{niveau}}). Gold values reflect active improvements.

roleDesc.soldat: The golem has a built-in weapon, blades, or claws in its fists. Its damage changes to [1d10 + STR Mod.].
roleDesc.gardien: Once per turn, if the golem is in contact with the PC, it may interpose itself and take the damage instead.
roleDesc.gladiateur: When the golem misses a melee attack, it gains a cumulative +1 bonus to damage and melee attack rolls until it hits.

specialisationDesc.soldat: As a limited action, the golem can attack two creatures in contact with it. A single attack roll is compared against each target's DEF.
specialisationDesc.gardien: The golem's armor is greatly reinforced, granting DR 3. This DR does not apply against damage from magical sources (spells and magical weapons).
specialisationDesc.gladiateur: When the golem is hit by a melee attack, it may counter once per turn as a free immediate action against its attacker.

ameliorationDescs.impulsion: As a limited action, can jump 20 meters in height or distance
ameliorationDescs.protectionRunique: Immune to lightning, halves fire and cold damage

cristaux.aucunFabrique: No crafted crystals — learn some from the catalogue.
cristaux.coutFabrication: Crafting a crystal costs <bold>200 silver pieces</bold>.

attributs.label: Manipulation
attributs.effet: Move up to [rang] m³ of matter within the spell's range

attributs.label: Resistance
attributs.effet: Increase an element's resistance – granting a bonus or penalty

attributs.label: Detection
attributs.effet: Investigate the quality of an element, or detect it

attributs.label: Range
attributs.effet: Increase the spell's range to 20 meters

attributs.label: Area
attributs.effet: Apply an area effect of 6 meters diameter or a 3 × 3 meter cone

attributs.label: Creation
attributs.effet: Create up to [rang] m³ of matter for the spell's duration

attributs.label: Entropy
attributs.effet: Accelerate an element's degradation – granting a bonus or penalty

attributs.label: Persistence
attributs.effet: Increase the spell duration to [1 tour + Mod. de SAG] rounds

attributs.label: Annihilation
attributs.effet: Apply a disappearance or cancellation effect. Halves DR.

attributs.label: Power
attributs.effet: Increase a spell's power, granting a bonus of +2 dice

attributs.label: Adversity
attributs.effet: Apply a detrimental condition or penalty in addition to any other effects

attributs.label: Catalyst
attributs.effet: Double the effects of an 'attribute' glyph

divines.label: Immortality
divines.effet: Applies a DR 5 effect, or DR 10 specific to a damage source (e.g. fire, slashing damage, etc.)

divines.label: Omniscience
divines.effet: Multiplies the spell's range by 10, increases detection quality (allows obtaining any desired information)

divines.label: Infinitude
divines.effet: Increases spell damage by 2 dice or extends spell duration to [5 + Mod. de SAG] rounds

divines.label: Void
divines.effet: Allows applying the spell's effects to up to [rang / 2] targets within range

divines.label: Fatality
divines.effet: Increases the spell resistance check difficulty by +3
